prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次约5531→5222→5367→11756→5179，2024年因专业组结构调整出现异常高位次（宏福校区等），2025年回归至5179名，近3年正常区间约 5179–5367名，2025年基准约5179名；本省物理类计划2021年83人→2022年81人→2023年83人→2024年82人→2025年86人，2026年计划大幅扩招至105人，较20 25年增加19人（增幅约22%），扩招幅度显著，竞争压力有所缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流；软科主榜排名从2021年第54名持续上升至2026年第50名，首次进入全国前50强 ，学校综合实力和认可度稳步提升；北邮在抖音平台热度排名第64（一般），但张雪峰等知名升学规划师持续推荐其为\"信息通信领域排头兵\"；声誉评价文件 中2026年未收录北邮负面信号，近年无重大投档断档或负面舆情，整体声誉平稳偏正面；信息与通信工程A+（全国顶尖）、计算机科学与技术A、电子科学与技 术A-、软件工程A-、网络空间安全A-，在信息通信领域具有绝对优势，对应招生专业（计算机类、通信工程、电子信息类、人工智能等）均为当前社会高热方向。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 北邮位于北 京，对湖北考生具有较强地域吸引力；该校在湖北招生占比约2.5%（2024年数据），属跨省招生正常比例；计算机类、电子信息/通信类专业热度持续高热（2024年电子信息/通信，高热推荐），电气工程及其自动化等工科专业也呈升温趋势；湖北物理类考生 2021年14.7万→2025年25.0万，持续增长，2026年估算约25.6万人，竞争基数扩大。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次5179名、2026年大幅扩招22%（ 使位次数字增大）、软科排名首次进入前50强（提升学校吸引力，使位次数字减小）、信息通信类专业持续高热（加剧竞争，使位次数字减小）、湖北物理类考生持续增长（扩大 竞争基数，使位次数字减小）等多重因素，扩招的宽松效应与排名提升+专业热度的收紧效应相互对冲，预计2026年最低位次约5816名，区间5316–6316名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 5531 → 5222 → 5367 → 11756 → 5179. In 2024, an abnormally high ranking occurred due to adjustments in major group structure (e.g., Hongfu Campus), but in 2025 it returned to 5179. Over the past three years, the normal range is approximately 5179–5367, with a baseline of about 5179 in 2025. The provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 83 in 2021 → 81 in 2022 → 83 in 2023 → 82 in 2024 → 86 in 2025. In 2026, the plan significantly expands to 105, an increase of 19 students (approximately 22%) compared to 2025, indicating a notable expansion and easing of competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class university. The Soft Science main ranking has steadily risen from 54th in 2021 to 50th in 2026, entering the national top 50 for the first time, reflecting continuous improvement in comprehensive strength and recognition. BUPT ranks 64th in popularity on Douyin (average), but renowned education planners like Zhang Xuefeng consistently recommend it as a 'pioneer in the information and communication field.' In reputation evaluation documents, no negative signals were recorded for BUPT in 2026, and there have been no major admission gaps or negative public opinions in recent years, indicating a generally stable and positive reputation. Its disciplines include Information and Communication Engineering A+ (top nationally), Computer Science and Technology A, Electronic Science and Technology A-, Software Engineering A-, and Cyberspace Security A-, giving it an absolute advantage in the information and communication field. Corresponding enrollment majors (Computer Science, Communication Engineering, Electronic Information, Artificial Intelligence, etc.) are all highly sought-after in current society.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Location
专业热度与地域.text: BUPT is located in Beijing, which has strong regional appeal for Hubei candidates. Its enrollment proportion in Hubei is about 2.5% (2024 data), a normal ratio for cross-provincial enrollment. Majors like Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication Engineering remain highly popular (Electronic Information/Communication was highly recommended in 2024), and engineering majors such as Electrical Engineering and Automation are also trending upward. The number of Hubei Physics Category candidates grew from 147,000 in 2021 to 250,000 in 2025, with an estimated 256,000 in 2026, expanding the competition base.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 5179, a significant 22% enrollment expansion in 2026 (which increases the ranking number), BUPT's first entry into the top 50 in Soft Science rankings (enhancing university appeal, decreasing the ranking number), sustained high popularity of information and communication majors (intensifying competition, decreasing the ranking number), and continuous growth of Hubei Physics Category candidates (expanding the competition base, decreasing the ranking number), the easing effect of expansion and the tightening effect of ranking improvement plus major popularity offset each other. The predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is approximately 5816, with a range of 5316–6316.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking falls within the predicted range of 5316–6316, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Communication Engineering, Electronic Information, Artificial Intelligence) as the main direction, Tier 1 majors (Yuan Class, Computer Science) as a reach, and Tier 3 majors (Software Engineering, Automation, etc.) as a safe backup. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower bound of the range (<5316), you can prioritize reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 2240 → 2784 → 2821 → 2740 → 2690. The best ranking was in 2021 (2240th), and it stabilized in the 2690–2821 range for the following three years, with a baseline of about 2690th in 2025. The provincial History Category enrollment plan was 12 students in 2021 → 12 in 2022 → 10 in 2023 → 11 in 2024 → 11 in 2025, and the 2026 plan remains at 11 students, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or reduction.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class; the Soft Science main ranking has steadily risen from 54th in 2021 to 50th in 2026, entering the national top 50 for the first time, indicating a steady improvement in overall strength. BUPT is a science and engineering university with a small scale of liberal arts programs. Its reputation has been stable in recent years, with no major negative incidents or enrollment gaps. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 64th (average), with moderate overall attention.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The Law major has high social popularity (recommended), while the Network and New Media major is clearly discouraged. The number of History Category examinees in Hubei was 149,000 in 2021 → 141,000 in 2025, with an estimated 138,000 in 2026, showing a slight decline. BUPT is located in Beijing, which still holds some regional appeal for Hubei History Category examinees, but the liberal arts enrollment scale is very small (only 11 students), leading to a relatively stable competitive landscape.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 2690th, unchanged enrollment plan, the university's ranking improvement to the top 50 (slightly enhancing overall appeal), a slight decrease in History Category examinees (easing competition slightly), and the low correlation between liberal arts majors and the university's core strengths, the estimated minimum ranking for 2026 is about 2720th, with a range of 2312–3128.
